test_CV.pdf: Shi Quan is a machine learning researcher with expertise in generative and spatiotemporal models, particularly in precipitation nowcasting. He has developed and co-authored cutting-edge models such as STLDM and FACL, which have achieved state-of-the-art performance and are open-sourced. His work focuses on improving the accuracy and visual sharpness of precipitation forecasts using advanced loss functions and diffusion models.
